subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Aqa Siyyid Hasan
subcodes.first_line: The call of God hath been raised from the right hand of the Ridván with such a call as is heard by the realities of all things upon the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع ندآء الله عن یمین الرضوان بندآء الذی یسمعه حقایق کل الاشیاء بین الارض
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
